model_designation.position_description: Lower part of the front grille on the viewer's left side.

grille_lights.row_structure: three rows of paired lights, preserving the exact spatial layout visible in the source photograph
grille_lights.outer_shape: small rectangular lights with rounded corners

grille.description: Four main horizontal grille levels. Simplify the honeycomb mesh into bold printable openings while preserving the original grille proportions.

visible_text.position_description: Large horizontal lettering centered on the upper front grille.
Small model designation on the lower grille, on the viewer's left side.

do_not_move: 460S must remain on the viewer's left side
the six grille lights must retain their original pyramid-like arrangement
do_not_invent: do not add SCANIA lettering to the side of the cab
do not add additional grille lights
do not relocate or mirror the 460S designation
